title: agent-toolkit spec frontmatter (v0.7.2)
description: YAML frontmatter contract for .agent-toolkit/specs/<branch>/<slug>.md files. Adds affected_modules (required from v0.7.2) and affected_symbols (optional, finer grain) so Layer 5 scope check can mechanically detect file-level scope creep at /verify time.

slug.description: Kebab/dot-case spec slug; matches filename stem.

affected_modules.description: List of file path PREFIXES (relative to workspace) that this spec is allowed to modify. Layer 5 scope check (verify_lint) compares actual modified files vs this list; out-of-scope edits trigger advisory warning (warn-only initial, upgradable to block via .agent-toolkit/scope_audit.json). Required for new specs from v0.7.2; legacy specs without this field are grandfathered (skip Layer 5). Globs supported via fnmatch (e.g. 'templates/**/*.py'). Public-project safe: no hardcoded stack names; use generic patterns.

affected_symbols.description: Optional finer-grain scope declaration: list of fully-qualified symbol names (e.g. 'module.ClassName.method'). Reserved for future AST-level scope check; not enforced in v0.7.2 (schema slot only).
